series_metadata.series_title: Other Tabacco Products License, Tax Reports, Schedules & Correspondence
series_metadata.series_description: OTP application for distributors license (OTP1), OTP return (OTP2), OTP supplemental schedules (OTP-3, OTP-4, OTP-5, OTP-6, OTP-9, OT-P10, OT-P11, OTP-13,OTP-14 and OTP-15),manufacturers registration (OTP-8), refund application (OTP-12), all related documentation, correspondence, cancelled master files and pay-in reports.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: 3 yrs end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year. ; Electronic: 3 yrs end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
